name: Avery Quinn
tagline: I build the connective tissue between design systems and the code that ships them.
availability: Open to select work from Q3 2026
about: I work between design and engineering: design systems, prototyping in code, and the production components that keep teams consistent. Before consulting I led the design systems group at a payments company.

projects.title: Lattice Design System
projects.summary: Component library and token pipeline for a multi-product platform. Cut design-to-production drift across nine teams.

projects.title: Signal Prototyping Kit
projects.summary: A toolkit for building interactive prototypes against real API data, so reviews test behavior rather than static screens.

projects.title: Grid Audit Tooling
projects.summary: A linter and visual overlay that checks layouts against a defined column grid in the browser, flagging spacing that falls off the baseline.
